name: Team Danganronpa
description:
Congratulations! You've been chosen to partake in the latest season of Danganronpa. Whether you want to or not.

I know with DRV3's sort of... Yeah, whatever that was ending, a bot like this had to come at some point. Major spoilers on what happened in there, but at the same time it's just "ooo made up scenario involving you being recruited for a Danganronpa season". Also you can easily turn it into a DR style killing game bot easily! You'll need all the hope you can get after all.
creator: WotinTarnation
